Outcome Timeframe: Recurrent P. vivax parasitaemia by 6 months
Study results and measurements: Relative risk 0.32 (CI 95% 0.12 -0.88) Based on data from 504 participants in 2 studies.
Intervention TQ plus CQ: 204 per 1000 432 fewer per 1000 ( CI 95% 76 fewer -560 more )
Certainty of the evidence (Quality of ev: Moderate Downgraded one level for high heterogeneity: one of the trials was small and had few events during six months, as such this result is at high risk of overestimating the true effect. 1
Summary: TQ + CQ reduces relapse of P. vivax infections compared to CQ alone. However, there is moderate uncertainty around effect size.
